entity.label: Joiarib
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: Ezra 8:16, a “man of understanding” whom Ezra sent to “bring ministers for the house of God.”

nodes.label: Joiarib
nodes.description: Ezra 8:16, a “man of understanding” whom Ezra sent to “bring ministers for the house of God.”

verses.text: Then sent I for Eliezer, for Ariel, for Shemaiah, and for Elnathan, and for Jarib, and for Elnathan, and for Nathan, and for Zechariah, and for Meshullam, chief men; also for Joiarib, and for Elnathan, men of understanding.
